accepted.bullet_text: [[larvitar-line]] — base-stage anchor for the Larvitar evolutionary line (Larvitar / Pupitar / Tyranitar), the Johto Generation II pseudo-legendary line. This print's flavor text "Born deep underground, it comes aboveground and becomes a pupa once it has finished eating the surrounding soil" is the most-cited canonical expression of the line's mountain-eater origin at the Larvitar stage — the cohort's design thesis explicitly identifies this text as the strongest anchor for the consume-the-mountain-become-the-mountain narrative arc, with the eat-the-mountain canon strongest at the Larvitar stage and the embodiment canon at the Tyranitar apex. [Scryfall flavor_text via PokemonTCG.io swsh3-86; cohort node body]
accepted.archetype_slot: base-stage / mountain-eater Pokedex canon — consume-the-mountain-become-the-mountain cost-of-power narrative arc origin

accepted.bullet_text: [[larvitar-line]] — Stage-1 mid-form anchor for the Larvitar evolutionary line (Larvitar / Pupitar / Tyranitar), the Johto Generation II pseudo-legendary line. This print's flavor text "Even sealed in its shell, it can move freely. Hard and fast, it has outstanding destructive power" is the cohort's canonical contained-power-ready-to-burst register, and the card's Rocket Evolution attack (search deck for the card that evolves from this Pokemon and put it onto this Pokemon to evolve it) mechanically encodes the species' waiting-to-burst-into-Tyranitar arc — the cohort design thesis identifies Pupitar as the bridge register between Larvitar's mountain-eating origin and Tyranitar's mountain-leveling apex, with the destructive-power-already-present flavor explicit on the printed card itself. [Scryfall flavor_text via PokemonTCG.io swsh3-87; cohort node body]
accepted.archetype_slot: Stage-1 mid-form / contained-power-ready-to-burst cocoon register — Rocket Evolution mechanical signature as the bridge register between mountain-eater origin and mountain-leveling apex
